creator: frank@altpeter.de
text:
Moin,

Patch is approved. Many thanks to Dmitry for taking the time to fix this.

on 2014-01-22 at 05:40:19 CET, you wrote:
> Maintainer of net-im/centerim,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/185982 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/185982
> 

 

Mit freundlichen Grüßen

	Frank Altpeter

-- 
FA-RIPE || http://www.altpeter.de/ || http://gplus.to/frank42
| "Far out in the uncharted backwaters of the unfashionable 
| end of the western spiral arm of the Galaxy lies a small 
| unregarded yellow sun. "
